description:
fixtures/concurrency_ping_pong.fz spawns a child and calls receive(); main returns 42 but never prints it. The fixture passes the matrix (exit 0, no stdout) but proves less than its purpose claims — a regression that broke send/receive but still exited 0 would silently pass.

## Fix

Add `print(receive())` (or capture return and print) so the fixture's success is observable in stdout. Re-bless fixtures/concurrency_ping_pong.expected to contain `42`.

## Acceptance

- fixture prints 42 on success
- .expected captures it
- matrix still green
title: concurrency_ping_pong.fz output is unobservable
